title: biscutella laevigata var. cuneata
intro: Biscutella laevigata var. cuneata, also known as Cut-leaved Chickweed Biscutella, is a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include the potential to help with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as skin conditions and wounds. Biscutella laevigata var. cuneata can be prepared for herbal use by making teas or infusions from its flowers and leaves, or by using it in salves and creams for topical applications.
